entries.spanish: La Biblia está sobre la mesa.
entries.english: The Bible is on the table.

entries.spanish: Mi mamá está en la cocina.
entries.english: My mom is in the kitchen.

entries.spanish: Mis amigos están en el parque.
entries.english: My friends are at the park.

entries.spanish: Mi perro está muy cansado hoy.
entries.english: My dog is very tired today.

entries.spanish: Mi abuela está enferma esta semana.
entries.english: My grandmother is sick this week.

entries.spanish: El jefe está en una reunión.
entries.english: The boss is in a meeting.

entries.spanish: Estuve en México por dos semanas.
entries.english: I was in Mexico for two weeks.

entries.spanish: Estuvimos en el estudio bíblico el miércoles.
entries.english: We were at Bible study on Wednesday.

entries.spanish: Mis amigos estuvieron aquí toda la tarde.
entries.english: My friends were here all afternoon.

entries.spanish: Mi papá estuvo en casa todo el día.
entries.english: My dad was home all day.

entries.spanish: Mis tíos estuvieron con nosotros en Navidad.
entries.english: My aunt and uncle were with us at Christmas.

entries.spanish: Estuve muy enfermo la semana pasada.
entries.english: I was very sick last week.

entries.spanish: Los niños estuvieron en la escuela hasta las tres.
entries.english: The children were at school until three.
Were you at the office yesterday?
We were at a restaurant last night.

entries.spanish: El pastor estuvo muy ocupado esta semana.
entries.english: The pastor was very busy this week.

entries.spanish: Estaré en Guatemala por una semana.
entries.english: I will be in Guatemala for a week.
Will you be at church on Sunday?

entries.spanish: El restaurante estará cerrado el lunes.
entries.english: The restaurant will be closed on Monday.

entries.spanish: Mi mamá estará en casa esta tarde.
entries.english: My mom will be home this afternoon.

entries.spanish: Mis papás estarán con nosotros en Navidad.
entries.english: My parents will be with us at Christmas.
The vet will be available tomorrow.

entries.spanish: Los estudiantes estarán de vacaciones la próxima semana.
entries.english: The students will be on break next week.

entries.spanish: El doctor estará en el consultorio hasta las cinco.
entries.english: The doctor will be in the office until five.

entries.spanish: ¿Estarán ustedes en la oficina el lunes?
entries.english: Will you all be at the office on Monday?

entries.spanish: La banda estará en el concierto el sábado.
entries.english: The band will be at the concert on Saturday.

entries.spanish: Estaremos en el estudio bíblico el jueves.
entries.english: We will be at Bible study on Thursday.
Will you be ready for the trip tomorrow?
